steps.title: Rewrite as a quadratic
steps.content:
Expand and move everything to one side:
$$x(kx-48)=-12$$
$$kx^2-48x=-12$$
$$kx^2-48x+12=0$$

steps.title: Use the discriminant condition
steps.content:
A quadratic has no real solutions when its discriminant is negative:
$$b^2-4ac<0$$
Here, $a=k$, $b=-48$, and $c=12$, so
$$(-48)^2-4(k)(12)<0$$
$$2304-48k<0$$
$$k>48$$

steps.title: Pick the least integer
steps.content: The least integer greater than $48$ is $49$. The answer is 49.
